goal: Add a side-effect-free default-off mount contract for the BPK-047 cockpit handler readiness result, describing the future mount shape without changing server, route, renderer, runtime, package, workflow, or deployment files.
scope_out: Do not mount routes, mutate server files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, or deployment files.
claims: Cockpit default-off mount shape can be contracted without mounting.
Ready BPK-047 readiness and env gate are required.
Server mutation and executable actions remain closed.
assumptions: A later implementation block may use this mount contract.
dod: Ready, enabled env, and blocked readiness cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mounting, server mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, or deployment changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-047 assessed cockpit handler mount readiness without mounting.
